Supervisors

Zhao Qi

Associate Professor, started Nov 2019

  • Postdoc with Xu Ruihua, Sun Yat-sen Univerisy.
  • PhD with Ren Jian, Sun Yat-sen Univerisy.
  • BSc Shaanxi University of Science & Technology.

Professor in Medical Oncology, Since 2019

  • PhD from MD Anderson Cancer Center.
  • MD from Sun Yat-sen University.
